mapper.select:
WITH details_count AS ( SELECT sil.write_year, sil.doc_type, sil.doc_no, sil.check_dt, sil.comp_id, sil.use_yn, COUNT(d.doc_seq) AS details_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'Y' OR d.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checked_details_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(COUNT(d.doc_seq), 0) <= COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'Y' OR d.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS done FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log sil LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail d ON d.write_year = sil.write_year AND d.doc_type = sil.doc_type AND d.doc_no = sil.doc_no GROUP BY sil.write_year, sil.doc_type, sil.doc_no ), inspections AS ( SELECT dc.write_year, dc.details_count, dc.checked_details_count, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(dc.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM') AS hse_yyyymm, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(dc.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS hse_date, COUNT(*) AS count, dc.done FROM details_count dc WHERE dc.comp_id = #{compId} -- Example comp_id AND dc.use_yn = 'Y'
AND TO_DATE(dc.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
GROUP BY dc.write_year, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(dc.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(dc.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), dc.details_count, dc.checked_details_count, dc.done ), aggregated_counts AS ( SELECT hse_yyyymm, hse_date, SUM(count) AS total_count, done FROM inspections GROUP BY hse_yyyymm, hse_date, done ), json_done AS ( SELECT hse_yyyymm, jsonb_object_agg(hse_date, total_count) AS done_json FROM aggregated_counts WHERE done = TRUE GROUP BY hse_yyyymm ), json_undone AS ( SELECT hse_yyyymm, jsonb_object_agg(hse_date, total_count) AS undone_json FROM aggregated_counts WHERE done = FALSE GROUP BY hse_yyyymm ) SELECT COALESCE(jsonb_agg(done_json) FILTER (WHERE done_json IS NOT NULL), '[]'::jsonb) AS done, COALESCE(jsonb_agg(undone_json) FILTER (WHERE undone_json IS NOT NULL), '[]'::jsonb) AS undone FROM json_done FULL OUTER JOIN json_undone ON json_done.hse_yyyymm = json_undone.hse_yyyymm

WITH inspections AS ( SELECT sil.write_year, sil.doc_type, sil.doc_no, scl.title, sil.std_eq_id, sil.equipment_id, ei.equipment_nm, ei.setup_location AS defaultLocation, sil.setup_location AS LOCATION, CASE WHEN sil.check_dt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN sil.check_start IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(sil.check_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN sil.check_dt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN sil.check_end IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(sil.check_end FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, sil.created_at FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log sil LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist scl ON scl.comp_id = sil.comp_id AND scl.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info ei ON ei.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id AND ei.equipment_id = sil.equipment_id AND ei.comp_id = sil.comp_id WHERE sil.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND sil.check_dt BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- :start_date, :end_date AND sil.use_yn = 'Y' ), checker AS ( -- 점검자 정보 조회 SELECT i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no, MAX(ai.hr_id) AS hr_id, MAX(ai.hr_nm) AS hr_name, MAX(ai.jbrp_nm) AS job_title, MAX(ai.orgn_nm) AS org_name, MAX(ai.updated_at) AS signed_at, SUM( CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS checker_count, SUM( CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS signed_checker_count FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = i.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(i.write_year, i.doc_no) GROUP BY i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no ), details_count AS ( -- 체크항목의 체크 여부 개수 조회 SELECT d.write_year, d.doc_type, d.doc_no, COUNT(d.doc_seq) AS details_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'Y' OR d.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checked_details_count FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail d ON d.write_year = i.write_year AND d.doc_type = i.doc_type AND d.doc_no = i.doc_no GROUP BY d.write_year, d.doc_type, d.doc_no ) SELECT CONCAT(i.write_year, '-', i.doc_type, '-', i.doc_no) AS id, COALESCE(dc.details_count, 0) AS details_count, COALESCE(dc.checked_details_count, 0) AS checked_details_count, i.title, CASE WHEN COALESCE(dc.details_count, 0) <= COALESCE(dc.checked_details_count, 0) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS done, json_build_object( 'id', i.equipment_id, 'name', i.equipment_nm, 'defaultLocation', i.defaultLocation, 'typeId', i.std_eq_id ) AS checkTarget, CASE WHEN c.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', c.hr_id, 'name', c.hr_name, 'jobTitle', c.job_title, 'orgName', c.org_name, 'signedAt', c.signed_at, 'signed', CASE WHEN c.checker_count > 0 AND c.checker_count <= c.signed_checker_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END ) ELSE NULL END AS checker, i.started_at AS startedAt, i.ended_at AS endedAt, i.created_at AS createdAt FROM inspections i LEFT JOIN checker c ON c.write_year = i.write_year AND c.doc_type = i.doc_type AND c.doc_no = i.doc_no LEFT JOIN details_count dc ON dc.write_year = i.write_year AND dc.doc_type = i.doc_type AND dc.doc_no = i.doc_no ORDER BY i.created_at DESC

WITH check_list_templates AS ( -- 설비별 안전점검표 목록 조회 SELECT scl.write_year, scl.doc_type, scl.doc_no, scl.comp_id, scl.title, scl.std_eq_id, ei.equipment_id, ei.equipment_nm, ei.setup_location AS default_location FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist scl JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info ei ON ei.comp_id = scl.comp_id AND ei.std_eq_id = scl.std_eq_id AND ei.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE scl.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND scl.use_yn = 'Y' ), inpection_logs AS ( -- 설비별 수행된 안전점검 정보 조회 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, sil.write_year AS inspection_write_year, sil.doc_type AS inspection_doc_type, sil.doc_no AS inspection_doc_no, sil.std_eq_id, sil.equipment_id, COUNT(d.doc_seq) AS details_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'Y' OR d.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checked_details_count FROM check_list_templates t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log sil ON t.comp_id = sil.comp_id AND t.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id AND t.equipment_id = sil.equipment_id AND sil.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND sil.check_dt = #{date} -- :check_date AND sil.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail d ON d.write_year = sil.write_year AND d.doc_type = sil.doc_type AND d.doc_no = sil.doc_no GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, sil.write_year, sil.doc_type, sil.doc_no ), checker AS ( -- 점검자 정보 조회 SELECT i.inspection_write_year, i.inspection_doc_type, i.inspection_doc_no, MAX(ai.hr_id) AS hr_id, MAX(ai.hr_nm) AS hr_name, MAX(ai.jbrp_nm) AS job_title, MAX(ai.orgn_nm) AS org_name, MAX(ai.updated_at) AS signed_at, SUM( CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checker_count, SUM( CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_checker_count FROM inpection_logs i LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = i.inspection_doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(inspection_write_year, inspection_doc_no) GROUP BY i.inspection_write_year, i.inspection_doc_type, i.inspection_doc_no ) SELECT -- 안전점검표 목록 조회 질의 본문 CONCAT(t.write_year, '-', t.doc_type, '-', t.doc_no) AS id, -- 안전점검표 ID t.title, -- 안전점검표 제목 (nullable) CASE WHEN i.inspection_write_year IS NOT NULL AND i.inspection_doc_type IS NOT NULL AND i.inspection_doc_no IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'id', CONCAT(i.inspection_write_year, '-', i.inspection_doc_type, '-', i.inspection_doc_no), 'done', CASE WHEN i.details_count <= i.checked_details_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END ) ELSE NULL END AS inspection, -- 수행된 안전점검 정보 (nullable) json_build_object( 'id', t.equipment_id, -- 대상 설비 ID 'name', t.equipment_nm, -- 안전점검표 대상 설비명 (nullable) 'defaultLocation', t.default_location, -- 대상 설비 기본 설치 장소 (nullable) 'typeId', t.std_eq_id -- 대상 설비 종류 ID ) AS checkTarget, CASE WHEN c.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', c.hr_id, 'name', c.hr_name, 'jobTitle', c.job_title, 'orgName', c.org_name, 'signedAt', c.signed_at, 'signed', CASE WHEN c.checker_count > 0 AND c.checker_count <= c.signed_checker_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END ) ELSE NULL END AS checker -- 점검자 정보 (nullable) FROM check_list_templates t LEFT JOIN inpection_logs i ON t.write_year = i.write_year AND t.doc_type = i.doc_type AND t.doc_no = i.doc_no AND t.std_eq_id = i.std_eq_id AND t.equipment_id = i.equipment_id LEFT JOIN checker c ON i.inspection_write_year = c.inspection_write_year AND i.inspection_doc_type = c.inspection_doc_type AND i.inspection_doc_no = c.inspection_doc_no

WITH check_list AS ( SELECT scl.write_year, -- 안전점검표 문서 작성연도 scl.doc_type, -- 안전점검표 문서 타입 scl.doc_no, -- 안전점검표 문서 번호 scl.title, scl.comp_id, ei.std_eq_id, ei.equipment_id, ei.equipment_nm, ei.setup_location FROM esg.tb_safety_checklist scl JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info ei ON ei.std_eq_id = scl.std_eq_id AND ei.equipment_id = #{eqId} -- :eq_id AND ei.comp_id = scl.comp_id AND ei.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE scl.comp_id = #{compId} AND scl.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND scl.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND scl.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND scl.use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ), check_list_items AS ( SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'category', sci.check_item, 'check', scd.check_list ) ) AS items FROM check_list l LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_item sci ON l.write_year = sci.write_year AND l.doc_type = sci.doc_type AND l.doc_no = sci.doc_no AND sci.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist_detail scd ON sci.write_year = scd.write_year AND sci.doc_type = scd.doc_type AND sci.doc_no = scd.doc_no AND sci.doc_seq = scd.check_item_seq AND scd.use_yn = 'Y' ) SELECT CONCAT(l.write_year, '-', l.doc_type, '-', l.doc_no) AS id, l.title, json_build_object( 'id', l.equipment_id, 'name', l.equipment_nm, 'defaultLocation', l.setup_location, 'typeId', l.std_eq_id ) AS checkTarget, i.items AS checkList FROM check_list l LEFT JOIN check_list_items i ON TRUE

WITH inspection AS ( -- 안전점검 상세 조회 SELECT sil.write_year, sil.doc_type, sil.doc_no, scl.title, sil.std_eq_id, sil.equipment_id, ei.equipment_nm, ei.setup_location AS defaultLocation, sil.setup_location AS LOCATION, sil.non_compliance_action AS action, CASE WHEN sil.check_dt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN sil.check_start IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(sil.check_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN sil.check_dt IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN sil.check_end IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt || ' ' || SUBSTRING(sil.check_end FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE TO_TIMESTAMP(sil.check_dt, 'YYYYMMDD')::timestamp END ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, sil.created_at FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log sil LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_checklist scl ON scl.comp_id = sil.comp_id AND scl.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id AND scl.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info ei ON ei.std_eq_id = sil.std_eq_id AND ei.equipment_id = sil.equipment_id AND ei.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id /* AND ei.use_yn = 'Y' */ WHERE sil.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND sil.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND sil.doc_type = 'SIL' -- :doc_type AND sil.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND sil.use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ), checker AS ( -- 점검자 정보 조회 SELECT i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no, MAX(ai.hr_id) AS hr_id, MAX(ai.hr_nm) AS hr_name, MAX(ai.jbrp_nm) AS job_title, MAX(ai.orgn_nm) AS org_name, MAX(ai.updated_at) AS signed_at, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS checker_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'change' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_checker_count FROM inspection i LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = i.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(i.write_year, i.doc_no) GROUP BY i.write_year, i.doc_type, i.doc_no ), check_list AS ( -- 체크항목 목록 조회 SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'docSeq', d.doc_seq, 'category', d.check_item, 'check', d.check_list, 'acceptable', CASE WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'N' AND d.non_compliant_yn = 'N' THEN NULL WHEN d.acceptable_yn = 'N' AND d.non_compliant_yn = 'Y' THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END ) ) AS LIST FROM inspection i JOIN esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail d ON d.write_year = i.write_year AND d.doc_type = i.doc_type AND d.doc_no = i.doc_no GROUP BY d.write_year, d.doc_type, d.doc_no ) -- 안전점검 상세 정보 조회 질의 본문 SELECT CONCAT(i.write_year, '-', i.doc_type, '-', i.doc_no) AS id, i.title, -- nullable CASE WHEN c.checker_count > 0 AND c.checker_count <= c.signed_checker_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS done, json_build_object( 'id', i.equipment_id, 'name', i.equipment_nm, -- nullable 'defaultLocation', i.defaultLocation, -- nullable 'typeId', i.std_eq_id) AS checkTarget, CASE WHEN c.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', c.hr_id, 'name', c.hr_name, -- nullable 'jobTitle', c.job_title, -- nullable 'orgName', c.org_name, -- nullable 'signedAt', c.signed_at, -- nullable 'signed', CASE WHEN c.checker_count > 0 AND c.checker_count <= c.signed_checker_count THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END ) ELSE NULL END AS checker, -- nullable i.location, -- nullable i.action, -- nullable i.started_at AS startedAt, i.ended_at AS endedAt, COALESCE(l.list, '[]'::json) AS checkList, i.created_at AS createdAt -- nullable FROM inspection i LEFT JOIN checker c ON TRUE LEFT JOIN check_list l ON TRUE
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log WHERE write_year = #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.writeYear} AND doc_type = #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_inspection_log ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, std_eq_id, equipment_id, check_dt, check_start, check_end, setup_location, non_compliance_action, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.writeYear}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docType}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docNo}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.compId}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.stdEqId}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.equipmentId}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.checkDt}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.checkStart}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.checkEnd}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.setupLocation}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.nonComplianceAction}, 'Y', now(), #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail WHERE write_year = #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.writeYear} AND doc_type = #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docType} AND doc_no = #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_inspection_log_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, ord_seq, check_item, check_list, acceptable_yn, non_compliant_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.writeYear}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docType}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docNo}, #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.docSeq}, 1, #{checkList.category}, #{checkList.check}, #{checkList.acceptableYn}, #{checkList.nonCompliantYn}, now(), #{hseInspectionsDetailSaveVO.createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_approval_info ( target_type, target_id, hr_id, param, created_at, created_by, hr_nm, orgn_nm, jbrp_nm ) SELECT #{docType}, CONCAT(#{writeYear}, #{docNo}), h.hr_id, 'change', NOW(), #{createdBy}, h.hr_nm, o.orgn_nm, cd.minor_nm AS jbrp_nm FROM esg.v_hr_info h LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info o ON h.orgn_id = o.orgn_id AND o.comp_id = #{compId} AND o.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp jbrp on jbrp.jbrp_id = h.jbrp AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE h.hr_id = #{hrId} LIMIT 1
